# Hemanth Soni

> Personal website of Hemanth Soni — builder, writer, and Head of Growth at Goldsky.

## About

Hemanth builds products and companies in financial services, data infrastructure, crypto, and various mixes of the three. He currently leads growth at Goldsky, a realtime data infrastructure company. Previously, he co-founded GroceryHero, built ventures at Diagram ($150M venture studio), led research at the World Economic Forum, and worked as a strategy consultant at Monitor Deloitte.

## Sections

- [Home](https://hem.so/): Overview with recent writing, projects, reading, and listening.
- [About](https://hem.so/about): Career history and background.
- [Writing](https://hem.so/posts): Blog posts on data indexing, crypto, SaaS pricing, fintech, and more.
- [Studio](https://hem.so/studio): Side projects and tools.
- [Places](https://hem.so/places): City guides with curated locations.
- [Colophon](https://hem.so/colophon): How this site was built.
- [Links](https://hem.so/links): Social and contact links.

## Contact

- Twitter: https://twitter.com/hemaaanth
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/hemanthsoni
- Website: https://hem.so
